case_title: MCAULIFFE, SIOBHAN vs. LEE, JOO HEE et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MCAULIFFE, SIOBHAN

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC TO PLAINTIFF AS TO WHY NO POS OR DISMISSAL FILED, IF NEITHER IS FILED AND NO GOOD CAUSE, COURT WILL DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-07-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-07-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: $100.00 SANCTIONS IMPOSED BUT STAYED PENDING DISMISSAL OF CASE. PLAINTIFF REQUIRED TO BE PRESENT AND TO POST SANCTIONS IF CASE IS NOT DISMISSED PRIOR TO 10/7/96. HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1996, CONTINUED TO OCT-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS HEREBY DISCHARGED. ON FOR DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCAULIFFE, SIOBHAN AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOO HEE HYUNG, WON J. DOES 1 - 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-07-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-10-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-18-1996
